---
pagetitle: "Field Notes — Matthew Zhou"
description-meta: "Code × analytics — weekly field notes from Matthew Zhou's Digital Summer Clinic 2026."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
[code × analytics]{.hero-prompt}

[field-notes]{.hero-title}

[Working notes from the **2026 Digital Summer Clinic** — building, measuring, and shipping at the intersection of code and analytics. New post every week.]{.hero-sub}
:::

[recent]{.section-label}
